author: michalbures
description: Convert file path to URI for easier use of links to local files outside of Obsidian.

manifest.author: Michal Bureš
manifest.description: Convert file path to uri for easier use of links to local files outside of Obsidian
manifest.name: File path to URI

name: File path to URI

releases.author: MichalBures
releases.description: Fix `%20` instead of spaces in file/folder names only links

releases.author: MichalBures
releases.description:
Add command to paste converted file path from clipboard as file uri link but with only the file/folder name as title
(Same as the previous release except the link title)

`C:\temp -> [temp](file:///C:/temp)`

releases.author: MichalBures
releases.description:
Add command to paste converted file path from clipboard as file uri link.

`C:\temp -> [C:\temp](file:///C:/temp)`

releases.author: MichalBures
releases.description: Add command to paste converted file path from clipboard as file uri

releases.author: MichalBures
releases.description: Add support for network paths and trim whitespace and quotation marks from selection
